title: Applied Researcher I (AI Foundations, LLM Customization, Finetuning, Reinforcement Learning)

revision_priority: Add one explicit Deep Learning proof point in the TikTok section so the JD must-have is evidenced in the body, not only implied by LLM/RAG wording.
Rewrite the summary to foreground ML + Deep Learning + LLM customization, then trim or split the overloaded TikTok bullet and remove bolding from modifier words.
Add body evidence for each JD must-have technology instead of leaving it only in Skills or Summary.
review.revision_instructions: Keep all immutable fields exactly as-is. Rewrite Summary sentence 1 so it leads with the strongest JD-aligned signal: M.S. CS candidate graduating May 2026 with concrete Machine Learning and Deep Learning experience in LLM evaluation, retrieval, and trustworthy AI systems; keep sentence 3 as the high-value pattern-recognition line. In the TikTok experience, add one truthful deep-learning proof point in the most relevant bullet, preferably a PyTorch-based embedding model, neural reranker, or fine-tuning/evaluation workflow tied to the RAG pipeline, so Deep Learning is visible in both Skills and body. Remove bold from modifier words such as internal, team-maintained, and bounded; keep bold only on technologies and metrics. Simplify the last TikTok bullet so it describes one clear ownership lane instead of a tool dump. If the TikTok and DiDi project subsections stay, make them distinct deep dives rather than near-paraphrases of the parent bullets; otherwise compress them so each project adds new evidence instead of repeating the same content. If there is no truthful deep-learning artifact to surface, this JD should be retargeted rather than left with Deep Learning un-evidenced.
